business_functions.name: Accounting
business_functions.description: General ledger, period close, consolidation, statutory reporting, financial controls.

business_functions.name: Business Operations
business_functions.description: Cross-functional operations: revenue operations, business operations, process improvement, and shared services not specific to any single function.

business_functions.name: Contract Operations
business_functions.description: Contract authoring, redlining, approval routing, signature, repository, obligation tracking. The operational side of legal contract management.

raci.process_name: Evaluate enterprise regulatory and compliance obligations
Evaluate enterprise regulatory and compliance obligations

business_functions.name: Customer Success
business_functions.description: Post-sale account health, expansion, retention, customer education, and onboarding for accounts after the initial sale.

business_functions.name: Executive
business_functions.description: CEO office, corporate strategy, business development, mergers and acquisitions, and corporate communications.

business_functions.name: Finance
business_functions.description: Function responsible for the books, treasury, planning, and procurement of the business.

business_functions.name: Governance, Risk and Compliance
business_functions.description: Enterprise risk, internal audit, compliance operations, privacy office, and policy management.

raci.process_name: Train employees on appropriate regulatory requirements
Train employees on appropriate regulatory requirements

business_functions.name: HR Service Delivery
business_functions.description: HR shared-services delivery: case management, employee self-service, knowledge, tier-1/tier-2 case escalation. The service-desk pattern applied to HR.

business_functions.name: Human Resources
business_functions.description: Function responsible for the full worker lifecycle: hiring, paying, developing, supporting, and offboarding the workforce. Owns HRIS-equivalent domains and partners with Finance on workforce cost.

business_functions.name: IT Asset Management
business_functions.description: Hardware, software, SaaS asset lifecycle, license compliance, asset financial management. Distinct from CMDB (configuration) and from procurement (sourcing).

business_functions.name: IT Operations
business_functions.description: Infrastructure, end-user computing, service desk, and corporate IT delivery for employee-facing technology.

raci.process_name: Manage IT user identity and authorization
Manage IT user identity and authorization

business_functions.name: IT Service Desk
business_functions.description: Employee-facing IT support: incident, request, knowledge management, walk-up and virtual agent service.

business_functions.name: Learning and Development
business_functions.description: Sub-function inside Human Resources that runs corporate learning, compliance training, and skills development.

business_functions.name: Legal
business_functions.description: Function responsible for contracts, regulatory compliance, intellectual property, and dispute management.

business_functions.name: Manufacturing Operations
business_functions.description: Production scheduling, shop-floor execution, quality, MES integration, OEE management.

business_functions.name: Marketing
business_functions.description: Brand, demand generation, content production, internal and external communications, customer marketing, and martech operations.

business_functions.name: Marketing Communications
business_functions.description: PR, analyst relations, customer marketing communications, and internal-facing corporate communications when housed under Marketing.

business_functions.name: Payroll
business_functions.description: Payroll calculation, gross-to-net, statutory filing, garnishments, pay distribution, payroll compliance.

business_functions.name: Procurement
business_functions.description: Sub-function inside Finance (or independent in some orgs) that runs sourcing, supplier management, and purchase orders.

business_functions.name: Product Management
business_functions.description: Product strategy, discovery, prioritization, roadmap ownership, and release coordination for software and physical products.

business_functions.name: Recruiting
business_functions.description: Talent acquisition, sourcing, candidate screening, interview coordination, offer management.

business_functions.name: Sales
business_functions.description: Pipeline ownership, account management, quota-carrying revenue generation, and sales operations support across direct and channel motions.

business_functions.name: Security
business_functions.description: InfoSec policy, security operations, identity and access management, vulnerability management, and incident response.

business_functions.name: Software Engineering
business_functions.description: Application development, platform engineering, site reliability, and quality engineering for the products and internal systems the company builds.
